title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: Complete Weekly Challenges to Unlock LSPD Officer Uniforms
content:
Don’t just act the part, look it by dressing for the job you want.

Complete five Dispatch Work Missions through April 8 to get the Summer LSPD Officer with Tie Outfit, plus GTA$200,000. Secure two Bail Office Bounties between April 9 and April 15 to unlock the Winter LSPD Officer Outfit and GTA$100,000.
